kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09B. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09B" and put them into a temporary table called J09B_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09B_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09B" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command:
UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    ELSE NULL
END;

WITH haus_counts AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
    FROM J09B_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NOT NULL THEN ENTSCHEIDUNG
    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM haus_counts hc
WHERE J09B_temp.HAUS = hc.HAUS;

WITH mandatory_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
      AND substr([Record created on], 1, 4) IN ('2023', '2024')
      AND EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM J09B_temp)
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN substr([Record created on], 1, 4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
       AND SUM(CASE WHEN substr([Record created on], 1, 4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory_eq);

WITH dm_eq AS (
    SELECT EQUNR
    FROM eabl
    WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
      AND substr([Record created on], 1, 4) IN ('2023', '2024')
      AND EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT EQUNR FROM J09B_temp)
    GROUP BY EQUNR
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN substr([Record created on], 1, 4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
       AND SUM(CASE WHEN substr([Record created on], 1, 4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
UPDATE J09B_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM dm_eq)
  AND ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING';

CREATE TEMP VIEW j09b_enriched AS
SELECT
  j."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  j.HAUS,
  j.ANLAGE,
  j.ME_MA_ID,
  j.EQUNR,
  j.HOUSE_NUM1,
  j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE,
  COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET,
  COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg g
  ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE
LEFT JOIN sales_master s
  ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n
  ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR;
SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('J09B_temp') WHERE name = 'Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.';
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT;

CREATE TEMP VIEW j09b_enriched AS
SELECT
  j."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  j.HAUS,
  j.ANLAGE,
  j.ME_MA_ID,
  j.EQUNR,
  j.HOUSE_NUM1,
  j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE,
  COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET,
  COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg g
  ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE
LEFT JOIN sales_master s
  ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n
  ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR;

args.sql_query:
SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL');

args.sql_query:
SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
FROM j09b_enriched
WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL');

SELECT g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
       j.HAUS,
       j.ANLAGE,
       j.ME_MA_ID,
       j.EQUNR,
       j.HOUSE_NUM1,
       j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
       j.HAUS,
       j.ANLAGE,
       j.ME_MA_ID,
       j.EQUNR,
       j.HOUSE_NUM1,
       j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
       j.HAUS,
       j.ANLAGE,
       j.ME_MA_ID,
       j.EQUNR,
       j.HOUSE_NUM1,
       j.ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
       CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM J09B_temp j
LEFT JOIN eablg g ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE
LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
WHERE j.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL');

args.email: Attached is the list of installations for tour J09B that require mandatory meter readings based on repeated machine estimations in 2023 and 2024.
Attached is the processed list of meter readings for tour J09B (excluding mandatory readings and direct mail customers).

kwargs.content:
Here is what I have executed for tour J09B:

1. **Temporary table creation**
   - Dropped any existing `J09B_temp`.
   - Created `J09B_temp` as:
     - All rows from `decision_table` where `TOUR` LIKE `'J09B%'`.
   - Added column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (TEXT) and an extra column `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."` (TEXT) to support exports.

2. **Base classification (KSA / EVU) with overrides**
   - Computed, per `HAUS`, the count of distinct `EQUNR`.
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` as follows:
     - First, four hard overrides to `EVU`:
       - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
       - `HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599`
       - `HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999`
       - `CITY1` or `CITY2` in (`'Wiblingwerde'`, `'Breckerfeld'`)
     - Then, for all remaining houses:
       - If count of distinct `EQUNR` per `HAUS` < 3 → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'`
       - Else → `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`
   - Overrides stay `EVU` even when house has < 3 meters.

3. **MANDATORY_READING classification (EABL, machine estimates)**
   - In `eabl`, for each `EQUNR` present in `J09B_temp`:
     - Looked at records where `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'`.
     - Considered year via `substr("Record created on", 1, 4)`.
     - Selected `EQUNR` that had at least one such record in **2023** and at least one in **2024**.
   - For all rows in `J09B_temp` whose `EQUNR` is in that set:
     - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.

4. **DIRECT_MAIL classification (EABL, customer readings)**
   - In `eabl`, for each `EQUNR` present in `J09B_temp`:
     - Looked at records where `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'`.
     - Again required at least one record in **2023** and one in **2024`.
   - For all rows in `J09B_temp` with those `EQUNR`:
     - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'`, but **only if** it was not already `MANDATORY_READING`.
   - So if an `EQUNR` meets both conditions, it remains `MANDATORY_READING`.

5. **Data enrichment (EABLG + net_master + sales_master)**  
   For all export queries, I joined as follows:

   - `J09B_temp j`
   - `LEFT JOIN eablg g ON g.Installation = j.ANLAGE`
     - Used `g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."` as `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."` in the exports.
   - `LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON s.EQUNR = j.EQUNR`
   - `LEFT JOIN net_master n ON n.EQUNR = j.EQUNR`
   - Customer data selection (per your rule: prefer sales; only fall back to net):
     - If `s.EQUNR` is not NULL (sales data exists), use only sales fields:
       - `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
     - Otherwise use the corresponding `net_master` fields.
   - The output contains only one set of customer fields; net-only customers keep their net data, mixed customers use sales data only.

6. **CSV exports (with required columns and filters)**

   For all exports I used exactly this column order:

   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`,  
   `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`,  
   `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

   a) **MANDATORY_READING export**
   - Query filtered on `j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'`.
   - File: **`J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`**
   - Rows exported: **792**
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_classic_tour_J09B_seed_42/J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
   - Sent via `send_mail` to:  
     `mandatory.reading@provider.com`  
     with a short explanation that these are J09B installations needing mandatory readings due to repeated machine estimations in 2023 and 2024.

   b) **DIRECT_MAIL export**
   - Query filtered on `j.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'`.
   - File: **`J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`**
   - Rows exported: **4068**
   - Path:  
     `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_classic_tour_J09B_seed_42/J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
   - Passed to `send_bulk_mail`:
